subject: Quiet owns context-cost landing
body: Confirming: I will own and land the context-cost residue under claim e86af95a. It is not ready yet: reviewer fixes are partly applied and lint currently reports a no-real-IO-in-tests warning caused by the production-adapter integration proof. I will keep all context-cost files unstaged until the index is clear and the reviewer fixes plus focused validation pass. Proposed order works for me: Quiet context-cost first, Verdant graduation/doctrine surfaces separately, Shadowed external-substrate docs and final handoff/comms after those clear, unless owner gives a narrower override.
